Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol and Mirtoselect—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 306
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 274
programme.desc: Kampo Blood Clean Supplement combines traditional herbal wisdom with modern wellness needs. Helps normalize blood pressure, blood sugar, and cholesterol levels. Helps to promote clear, flexible, and elastic blood vessels, reducing stroke risk. Kampo Anti-dampness capsules help remove excess dampness from the body and balance internal energy for optimal health. Helps eliminate edema and reduce water retention.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 311
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 238
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 297
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance.

programme.title: We Are Big Eaters - All Over Taiwan S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hosted by Chung Hsin-yu, "We Are Big Eaters" bring viewers to popular street food stalls and eateries to recommend good food to the viewers and simultaneously competing for the "Big Eaters" novelty.

programme.title: The Glorious Pediatricians S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: The documentary captures the daily work of pediatricians and healthcare staff in major departments of Shenzhen Children's Hospital, including emergency pediatrics, cardiothoracic surgery, intensive care, neurosurgery, urology, orthopedics, endocrinology, and hematology oncology. It focuses on the common interactions between ordinary people and hospitals, using the life and work of pediatricians as a microcosm.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 43
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 11
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De starts to seriously think about what exactly happened on the day he time travelled, hoping to find a way back to 2020. He suspects that the weather and Bi An's savings passbook are the key to his time travel.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 11
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Li Xiangmin keeps insisting on getting married and even asks her mother to fund the wedding. Zhang Shilan tells her to sell her designer bags for cash and has no intention of paying her any attention.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 12
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) To avoid suspicion, Nanxiu urges Zhihui to stop learning pilates from Sulin, but their intimate interaction is spotted by Youli. Nanxiu then continues to placate Sulin with lies, while Sulin remains completely unaware.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: The Witch’s Diner - EP 7
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) While attending the wedding of Grandma Fu Lan's son, Zheng Zhen unexpectedly discovers that Tom Jin is married and has a daughter.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 80
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 13
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 22
programme.desc: Zeng Di's renewed involvement in Han Ting's life sparks speculation among colleagues and leaves Ji Xing feeling unexpectedly unsettled. While neither is willing to address the awkwardness directly, their unspoken emotions become harder to ignore with each passing day.

programme.title: Time Concert 2024 - EP 2
programme.desc: After 20 years, the Girls are back on stage! "Time Concert 2024" revives nostalgic melodies, celebrating two decades of music with a dazzling showcase and a competition for the top hits of the era!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 14
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven - EP 4
programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 474
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 39
programme.desc: The truth can no longer remain hidden as Xiao Yao's identity is finally revealed, bringing years of separation and longing to an end. While Cang Xuan is overwhelmed by the long-awaited reunion, Xiao Yao finds herself standing at the crossroads of duty and the peaceful life she once cherished. As Tushan Jing, Xiang Liu and Cang Xuan each make silent choices for her sake, a new chapter begins with destinies more tightly intertwined than ever before.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 8
programme.desc: A breakthrough in Ching-lam's investigation points towards an overlooked witness, prompting fresh questions about the events surrounding his brother's death. At the same time, Ying-fung urges him not to lose himself in obsession.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven - EP 4
programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 222
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 9
programme.desc: As Ching-lam's skills improve, he begins stepping into the ring with greater confidence. However, every victory reminds him that the greatest battle still lies outside the ropes, where truth and forgiveness remain elusive.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 475
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 1
programme.desc: After leaving the Zhu Yi Wei behind, Ren Ruyi hopes to escape her violent past but is soon drawn back into the conflict between Wu and An. Meanwhile, Ning Yuanzhou is tasked with rescuing the captured Emperor of Wu and begins preparing a diplomatic mission to An. Their separate journeys are set to collide in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 98
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 23
programme.desc: Su Zhi Zhou's decision to expand the business without consulting Ji Xing triggers the biggest disagreement they have faced since founding Xingchen Technology. As tempers flare, Li Li finds herself caught between loyalty to her friend and responsibility to the company.

programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Awal Mulanya Gimana Mba Taylor?
programme.desc: Jojo accidentally meets Laras, who ran away because she couldn't pay the bus fare. It turns out Laras' money is missing. Laras runs and meets Jojo. Laras immediately gets into Jojo's car to escape. Finally, Laras admits to being a telecommuter.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 28
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Susah Banget Dah Memadamkan Api Cinta
programme.desc: Bimo (Ridho Ilahi) is a chef and restaurant owner who was saved by Luna (Shanice Margaretha) from a fire. Bimo recently broke up with Indah because she was too focused on her restaurant. Bimo tries to get close to Luna, the firefighter who saved his life.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 23
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: SANG MUBALIGH
programme.desc: A profound moral journey rich in Islamic teachings and spiritual outreach (dakwah). programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 27
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT - EP 3
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: HIKMAH - EP 18
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Ibaratnya Gini Wir, Lu Digoreng Tapi Gamon
programme.desc: Bella wants to learn entrepreneurship, then she partners with a handsome guy, who she finds incredibly annoying. Bella then harbors a grudge against him, making him afraid to have another relationship with her. But then the guy disguises himself as a blind man. He then disguises himself as a minibus driver and takes Bella home

programme.title: Saya Kan Cuma Ikan, Maka Saya Tau isi Hatimu
programme.desc: Adit (Ridwan Ghany) is a spoiled, sheltered rich boy who has spent his entire life relying on his father's deep pockets. When his father suddenly goes bankrupt and decides to start a catfish restaurant with a friend, Adit's world shatters. To make matters worse, Adit absolutely detests catfish. Now, Nuri (Syahnaz Sadiqah) and the patient Babe Rojak must use every ounce of their sanity to teach the stubborn, clueless Adit the gritty basics of catfish farming.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 28
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) refuses to accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea told him that Bryan's travel business was a scam. Because of Dhea, Bryan suffered losses and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work at Bryan's travel business for two weeks.

programme.title: Keliatan Banget Nyenggol Hati King Dosen
programme.desc: As Galang passed by, a man wearing the same jacket ran past him. Moments later, the man came chasing after Erin's purse snatcher. Galang was nearly beaten by the mob. Galang was accused of stealing Erin's wallet. Ultimately, Galang was saved and acquitted. Erin searched for the house address and managed to find Lalu, who introduced himself as Johan's son. It turned out that Erin had been searching for her family.

programme.title: Rekayasa Cinta Dokter Cantik No Play Play
programme.desc: Angel (Zoe Abbas), who is constantly pressured by her mother to marry, finally takes the practical route by claiming to be the lover of her patient who suffers from amnesia. Angel's two friends disagree with Angel's idea, but ultimately they support her. Angel says she will soon marry a man whose real name is Marcel (Bryan McKenzie) because Angel claims to be Marcel's fiancée before Marcel's amnesia.

programme.title: VAKSIN EKSTRA HANDSOME PENANGKAL VIRUS KOROSI CINTA
programme.desc: When Andien decides to hire the charming Reza to act as her pretend partner, she sets strict boundaries. But as the lines between performance and reality begin to blur, she faces the ultimate test: can she stop herself from breaking the number one rule and actually falling in love with her rented boyfriend?

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 2
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Lengah Dikit Jadi Miss Kambing
programme.desc: Ketrin (Amanda Salmakhira), the wealthy daughter of a goat farm owner, is forced to manage the family business alongside Dika (Hardi Fadhillah), a charming local village youth. It’s love at first sight for Dika, but a messy love triangle erupts when his own older brother, Firman (Yugo Avaero), also sets his sights on winning Ketrin’s heart

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 28
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 174
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOK TOK TOK PAKET JODOH ASYIAPPP
programme.desc: To keep her family financially afloat, Dania secretly participates in dangerous, illegal street races. When her mother uncovers the truth, she fiercely opposes it, terrified that Dania will suffer the same fate as her older brother, who was left paralyzed from a racing accident. Caught between survival and her mother's tears, Dania must find a safer way to make a living

programme.title: Tanpa Kamu Warga Indonesia Kurang Satu
programme.desc: Bian (Kevin Hillers) is thrilled to cross paths with his old friend, Qiara (Larasati Nugroho), only for his heart to shatter when he realizes she cannot see him; Qiara completely lost her sight in a tragic accident. Deeply moved, Bian stays by her side to support her, and the two form an unbreakable bond—even though Qiara already has a boyfriend waiting in the wings.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 28
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: OB CANTIK PENCABUT RASA GALAU
programme.desc: Raya's love story is often taken advantage of by her boyfriend for being too much of a pussycat.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 175
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ADA DOKTER CANTIK DI BALIK UDANG
programme.desc: Roni and Lara's chaotic first meeting begins when Roni accidentally spills a plate of shrimp all over Lara’s clothes. Despite the disastrous, messy start, the tension eventually melts into a deep, mutual attraction. However, just as they realize they are falling head over heels for each other, harsh circumstances step in to pull them apart

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 3
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Cewek Keker Berhati Flower
programme.desc: Farel (Aliando Syarief) is deeply in love with Laura, but his constant hesitation to propose drives her family to marry her off to another man named Bima instead. Bitter and resentful, a heartbroken Laura takes Farel out for a high-speed confrontation inside her car to vent her anger. Distracted and driving recklessly, she swerves to avoid two children, only to violently crash into a fried rice cart owned by Fajar, who was in the middle of a video call with his fiancée. The devastating crash sen

programme.title: VAKSIN EKSTRA HANDSOME PENANGKAL VIRUS KOROSI CINTA
programme.desc: When Andien decides to hire the charming Reza to act as her pretend partner, she sets strict boundaries. But as the lines between performance and reality begin to blur, she faces the ultimate test: can she stop herself from breaking the number one rule and actually falling in love with her rented boyfriend?

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 3
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Lengah Dikit Jadi Miss Kambing
programme.desc: Ketrin (Amanda Salmakhira), the wealthy daughter of a goat farm owner, is forced to manage the family business alongside Dika (Hardi Fadhillah), a charming local village youth. It’s love at first sight for Dika, but a messy love triangle erupts when his own older brother, Firman (Yugo Avaero), also sets his sights on winning Ketrin’s heart

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 29
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: TOK TOK TOK PAKET JODOH ASYIAPPP
programme.desc: To keep her family financially afloat, Dania secretly participates in dangerous, illegal street races. When her mother uncovers the truth, she fiercely opposes it, terrified that Dania will suffer the same fate as her older brother, who was left paralyzed from a racing accident. Caught between survival and her mother's tears, Dania must find a safer way to make a living

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 176
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: VIRUS CINTA CEWEK CINCAU
programme.desc: When the local grass jelly (cincau) vendor is as drop-dead gorgeous as Lala (Masayu Clara), every male customer in the neighborhood instantly catches the 'love virus.' The real question is: will the stubborn, cynical Rendy (Ridho Ilahi) succumb to her charms, or is he immune to the beautiful street vendor?

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 4
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Cinta Terhalang Bikin Aku Ang Ang Ang
programme.desc: Hit hard by a massive corporate layoff in Jakarta, Dara (Amanda Salmakhira) searches desperately for a new job, but every interview leads to a dead end. To make matters worse, while trying to rescue a stray kitten stranded in the middle of a busy road, she is nearly run over by a speeding car driven by Ryan (Ridho Illahi)

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 30

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 51
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan game show untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 18
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 29
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 10
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 8
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Serba Tahu - EP 1
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 13
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 19
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 16
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 1
programme.desc: Frust Gila rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Opera Zero - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan yang memaparkan Zero sebagai sebuah kumpulan lawak di atas satu pentas.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 1
programme.desc: Cinta segi tiga remaja sekolah menengah yang rumit dengan masalah keluarga dan rahsia besar dari masa lalu.

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.title: Perempuan Disarung Ungu
programme.desc: Kisah Marziah yang terpaksa menjalani hukuman penjara dalam keadaan mengandung kerana dituduh membunuh. Siapakah dalang yang sebenarnya bertanggungjawab? Lakonan Tya Ariffin dan Shukri Yahya.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 9
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Kuali Terbalik - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah program baru yang menggabungkan elemen drama, komedi dan program masakan dalam satu rancangan. Setiap episod akan menampilkan spoof dari drama terbaik Astro juga dari filem box office

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 19
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 6
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 4
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: Gerak Geri GenZ - EP 3
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: Elak Elak S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa yang menengahkan kisah-kisah tauladan yang akan di terajui oleh Achey, Fad, Ajak, Zulin.

programme.title: Seri Ferry Mart - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah Sitkom tempat kerja di sebuah pasar raya sibuk, penuh dengan gelak tawa dan situasi tidak dijangka. Saksikan Sherry Al- Hadad, Nabila Huda, Bell Ngasri & ramai lagi yang pasti mencuit hati anda.

programme.title: Spontan Boboi & Kengkawan - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 5
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Muzikal Lawak Superstar 2 Terbaik - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Siapa-Siapa Itu? - EP 4
programme.desc: Berkonsep kan kejutan dimana selebriti akan menyanyikan lagu duet dengan pasangan duet mereka tanpa dijangka. Selebriti tersebut akan meneka siapa disebalik suara misteri itu.

programme.desc: Lieutenant Colonel Raj Singh Yadav and his soldiers protect the Nathu La Pass from the Chinese while coping with the pain of being separated from their loved ones. Release Year: 2018 Director: J.P. Dutta Awards: 2019 Nominee Jury's Choice Award- Best Lyricist- Javed Akhtar

programme.title: Hero No. 1
programme.desc: A wealthy business heir plights his troth to household chores for the sake of love. Posing as Raju, the man of many talents, he sweeps, mops, cooks, sings, and dances his way into the hearts of his girlfriend's near and dear ones. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Army
programme.desc: Army officer Arjun marries Geeta but is killed by gangster Naagraj. Geeta, pregnant and fueled by revenge, teams up with escaped convicts to fight Naagraj. Release Year: 1996 Director: Raam Shetty

programme.title: Laadla
programme.desc: Anil Kapoor works for Sridevi's group of industries. After a series of clashes, Sridevi plots revenge by marrying him. Release Year: 1994 Director: Raj Kanwar Awards: 2 nominations

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: Separated from his royal parents, Raju grows up to be horse-carriage driver and falls for Ruby. Does unite with her and his parents? Release Year: 1985 Director: Manmohan Desai

programme.title: Singh Saab The Great
programme.desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson. Release Year: 2013 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Pal Pal Dil Ke Paas
programme.desc: Saher, a video blogger, embarks on a solo trip to expose Karan, the owner of a tourism company she believes is a fraud. They both start off on a bitter note but gradually fall in love. Release Year: 2019 Director: Sunny Deol Awards: 2020 Winner Jury's Choice Award- Best Playback Singer - Male- Arijit Singh

programme.title: Diya
programme.desc: Forced into abortion, Thulasi's pain turns supernatural when the vengeful spirit of her unborn child returns years later, punishing those who destroyed her innocent future.

programme.title: Commando 2
programme.desc: A man uses his combat skills to eradicate black money, which has been siphoned to banks abroad.

programme.desc: Gattu is head over heels in love with his neighbour, Binny. However, he becomes disheartened when her family and entire neighbourhood treat him as her brother.2017 Release Year: 2017 Director: Ajay Pannalal

programme.desc: A man falls in love with a famous violinist who has a tragic past.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Movie - Em Mahan
programme.desc: A man, who is well-known for his strictness in his village, treats his son badly. The son wants to marry his childhood friend, but his parents and the girl's parents are at loggerheads, making it tough for him to marry her.

programme.title: Movie - Pachakuthirai
programme.desc: A man who lives in the slums is infamous for harassing people. He is unaware that the people hate him, but when he finally realises this, he decides to transform himself completely.

programme.title: Movie - Piragu
programme.desc: Sathya, who comes to Chennai to be a film director, ends up being targeted by two rival gangs, whose leaders have enough reason to kill him. Now, Sathya must gather his courage and fight his enemies.

programme.title: Movie - Pirappu
programme.desc: Karthika falls in love with Prabha, Sharanya and Mahadevan's adopted son. Prabha, however, loves Mayura, which upsets Karthika. On seeing her heartbroken, Karthika's father kills Prabha's parents.

programme.title: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Ethir Kaatru

programme.title: Movie - Annan Ennada Thambi Ennada
programme.desc: A man continually disrespects women, much to the annoyance of his brother. Frustrated by his behaviour, his brother decides to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Movie - Nam Naadu (New)
programme.desc: Muthazhagu, an honest youth leader, opposes his corrupt politician father, Aalavandhar, who aspires to become the chief minister by bullying the villagers.

programme.title: Movie - Vaidegi Kathirunthal
programme.desc: When Vaidehi and Vellaisamy meet, their lives undergo a drastic turn. They discover that they must join forces to save a young couple from the wrath of the villagers.

programme.title: Movie - Murattu Kaalai
programme.desc: Although Kaalaiyan and his brothers can afford a luxurious lifestyle, they choose to live modestly. However, Sundaravelu is a devious man who tries to grab their land.

programme.title: Movie - Kazhugu
programme.desc: Sera and his friends retrieve the bodies of those who commit suicide in the town. One such incident brings them in touch with Ayya who warns them to not retrieve the bodies of the policemen he killed.

programme.title: Movie - Pokkri Thambi

programme.title: Movie - Maranthen Mannithen

programme.title: Movie - Sivasakthi

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 20 OCT
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 8, starting with the early kick-off between Nottingham Forest and Chelsea, moving on to Fulham's home clash with Arsenal at Craven Cottage, and concluding with the weekend's headline fixture: Liverpool versus Manchester United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. Through exclusive interview

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik
programme.desc: This episode features a Fight of the Night contest between strawweights Cheyanne 'The Warrior Princess' Vlismas and Karolina 'The Polish Assassin' Wojcik, both making their debut. This was a 3-round war with one fighter taking home the split decision victory. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Juan Diaz vs Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features 'Baby Bull', Juan Diaz, (34-2, 17 KOs) battling Paul Malignaggi, aka 'Magic Man', (26-2, 5 KOs) in a junior welterweight title bout from the Toyota Center in Houston, Texas, USA, on August 22, 2009. Over 7,000 filled the arena for this bout, while another 1.1 million watched on television to see a controvers

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned. The World Karate Federation expects a field of Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League makes its debut in Dubl

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Erik Morales vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight title bout that goes the full 12 rounds, between the unbeaten Danny Garcia and veteran Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Terunofuji, Tobizaru, Ryuden and Tamawashi.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to San Jose, California where the top 30 competitors from the Military Qualifier tackle the Military Finals course. In addition to the obstacles from the Military Qualifier, contestants will face Salmon Ladder, Arm Rings, Doorknob Arch and Spider Climb. Top competitors Army National Guard Caption Ryan Stratis, active Navy Lieutenant Junior Grade Dustin McKinney and Coast Guard Aviation Survival Technician Robin Pietschmann will take on the course.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Paul Williams vs. Antonio Margarito
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a WBO welterweight title bout featuring then-undefeated Paul Williams and Antonio Margarito. It's a closely scored bout, but one fighter's push towards a strong finish may have put him ahead just enough.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a WBO welterweight title bout featuring then-undefeated Paul Williams and Antonio Margarito. It's a closely scored bout, but one fighter's push towards a strong finish may have put him ahead just enough.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 3 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan feature Hokutofuji, Todushoryu, Hoshoryu and Endo.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: This episode features a Light Middleweight title bout between an unbeaten Keith Thurman and Carlos Quintana, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned. The World Karate Federation expects a field of Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League makes its debut in Dubl

programme.title: FS MMA Mark Burch vs. Kazuo Takahashi
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mark Burch looks to welcome Kazuo 'Yoshiki' Takahashi to BodogFIGHT in Costa Rica. Kazuo is the original "King of Pancrase" and he looks to pad his win record against a tough opponent in Mark Burch.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: This episode features a light heavyweight championship match between Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. from Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York, USA, on November 8, 2008. A total of 14,152 were in attendance at Madison Square Garden to see Calzaghe in his last professional bout, but would he go out a winner?

programme.title: Greatest Classics Roberto Duran vs. Sean Fitzgerald
programme.desc: One of the greatest fighters of all time, Boxing Hall of Famer Roberto Duran, continues his comeback against Worcester, Massachusetts native Sean Fitzgerald. Duran would enter the bout coming off three straight victories, looking to continue his run towards another shot at a world championship. He would get more than he bargained for against the young undefeated Fitzgerald, who gave Duran a more competitive fight than anyone could have expected. "Greatest Classics" visits Casino Magic from Ba

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 68
programme.desc: The Teletubbies travel by Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they all spin around on the Tubby Spinny.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'umbrella', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different types of umbrella - rainy, sunny and even dancing ones! Dee and a friend have frog umbrellas, and we even meet a Cinderella umbrella. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: It's the day of Mayor Oki's Ice Skate Skate-tacular. But there is too much ice, and it's stopping everyone from getting to the show! Messy must find a way to melt the ice and save the show.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he won't let them use Mojo's tops. But camping Preston's way soon starts a fire. It's Mojo and Bo to the rescue!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Glitch visits Rome to race his grimbots in the Colosseum. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 33
programme.desc: When Dad has to stop having fun with the girls and go to work, Bluey and Bingo scramble to keep him playing games with them on the trampoline!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 36
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo are playing The Quiet Game and won't use words to tell Dad which toy to buy for Muffin. At his wits end, Dad recruits new store clerk Alfie to help interpret the girls miming.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 27
programme.desc: Andy takes to his safari mobile and jets off to the Kalahari Desert in Africa. His mission; to find out how sand grouse chicks drink water.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip to a surprising destination, where they learn they can make anywhere special and earn their Big Day Out badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals, helping them to learn all about life in far away places, earning their Pen Pal badges and making some new friends in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise time to earn their Being Quiet badges!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her! The Go Jetters must race to save her.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: In Istanbul's Grand Bazaar, Glitch wishes he could buy everything. Hearing about the wishes granted by the Hen's Eye Column in an underground water store, the Basilica Cistern, Glitch heads beneath the earth and brings the entire cistern close to collapse!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 9
programme.desc: After being scolded for making a mistake, Diesel plays a trick on Rebecca to try and get the other engines in trouble.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: Sarah's hat goes on an adventure without her, on top of a balloon.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Sarah is keen to adopt a sea creature, but doesn't get her first choice...

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Stanley and Morris put too many boxes on the barge and now one end is sinking and the other is lifting up. Stanley get's the townsfolk to help level it out.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Stanley goes to help Myrtle, who has found a paint smudge on the Town Hall's door!

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about all the fun stuff about where they live.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are looking after Monty the dog for the day. Whilst JoJo would like to see Monty's new rolling-over trick, she learns that there's much more to looking after a dog than just play.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Betty and Sargent Ant just want perfection, but no one seems to be listening to their shouting! They need a lesson in diplomacy to learn how to speak in a more sensitive way.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Roly has lost his best potato but Duggee finds it using his sense of smell. But what is a sense? Time for the Squirrels to learn about the five senses and earn their Senses Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 49
programme.desc: The Go Jetters discover what made the Wolfe Creek Crater - a meteorite.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the daring Orange attempting to cross the stage on a tightrope, if she manages to ignore any distractions.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Cucumber performing Cool Under Pressure while trying to not let any obstacle ruin her calm routine.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Chilli becomes Super Chilli as he tries to be a superhero just like Supertato.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies are shocked when they meet a turnip in the deli counter.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 69
programme.desc: The Teletubbies eat lots of Tubby Toast and make a huge pile of crumbs. Luckily, The Noo-­Noo is on hand to clean up.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 3
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'cucumber', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see cucumbers that are crunchy, mushy in the middle and curly. Dee meets a cool cucumber, and we meet a very cute baby one. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Messy accidentally drops his jam sandwich, but why did it fall down and not up? He goes to OKIDO and rockets up to the moon to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 40

programme.desc: The grimbots attach a bit of the Taj Mahal to GrimHQ. It remains to be seen whether the Go Jetters can fix the glitch.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.desc: Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the amazing things trees do for the creatures who live amongst them, and earn their tree badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip to a surprising destination, where they learn they can make anywhere special and earn their Big Day Out badges in the process!

programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals, helping them to learn all about life in far away places, earning their Pen Pal badges and making some new friends in the process!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: In order to help protect a sandcastle that he and Tala built, Glitch uses a giant vacuum to suck up the sand from the Academy's beach, exposing the illusive ghost crabs to the hungry seagulls up above. To make matters worse, Glitch and his Grimbots lose control of the vacuum, causing chaos in the ocean. Can the Go Jetters protect the crabs while also returning the sand to its proper place?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her! The Go Jetters must race to save her.

programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: In order to help protect a sandcastle that he and Tala built, Glitch uses a giant vacuum to suck up the sand from the Academy's beach, exposing the illusive ghost crabs to the hungry seagulls up above. To make matters worse, Glitch and his Grimbots lose control of the vacuum, causing chaos in the ocean. Can the Go Jetters protect the crabs while also returning the sand to its proper place?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her! The Go Jetters must race to save her.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 10
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Sarah is keen to adopt a sea creature, but doesn't get her first choice...

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: Duck is bored of his toy collection, so he and Sarah search for old toys in the attic.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Stanley helps Little Woo and Seamus fly their new kite. It gets stuck up a tree and breaks. Using leaves and sticks, they build a better one, only for that to get stuck.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Stanley and Morris put too many boxes on the barge and now one end is sinking and the other is lifting up. Stanley get's the townsfolk to help level it out.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: From riding cows to having pigs in the house, the funny animals chat about everything brilliant about farms.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 41
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are looking for old things to take to the Jumble Sale. JoJo doesn't understand why anybody would want to buy Gran Gran's old things. But she soon discovers that one person's old things can be brand new to somebody else.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: Duggee hosts a Buddy Bonanza for Mrs Weaver and the Squirrels, with the aim of finding new buddies with common interests to them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Betty and Sargent Ant just want perfection, but no one seems to be listening to their shouting! They need a lesson in diplomacy to learn how to speak in a more sensitive way.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 50
programme.desc: The Go Jetters plan a surprise birthday party for Ubercorn!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Corn singing an A-maiz-ing Counting Song about his remarkably organised kernel rows.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the daring Orange attempting to cross the stage on a tightrope, if she manages to ignore any distractions.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies are shocked when they meet a turnip in the deli counter.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea face each other in a dance-off so Supertato can rescue his friends.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 70
programme.desc: Laa-­Laa and Po drive in the Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on the Tubby Bouncy. Tinky Winky and Dipsy arrive and they have a go at bouncing too!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 4
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'ear', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we see lots of different ears - big, little, listening and funny ones. We meet a polar bear with chilly ears, and Dee goes into space to see an alien's ears. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Messy the monster hears a chirping bird outside his window, but he can't understand what the bird is saying.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 41
programme.desc: Mojo needs to deliver a pizza to a very hard-to-reach island, but some stubborn seabirds have their eye on the pizza. Will Mojo have to go supersonic to get past them?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch makes popcorn in Mount Etna, Italy, he blocks the volcano and endangers farms on its slopes.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 38
programme.desc: When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter putdowns.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: Jetting off in his Safari mobile, Andy heads to Indonesia in search of the world's largest lizard, the Komodo dragon.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch needs some help from the Playtimers to make hoopy owl bagels. It's time for a tasty adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak when Roly inadvertently goes on the run with the world's smelliest cheese, earning their Cheese badges in the process.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the amazing things trees do for the creatures who live amongst them, and earn their tree badges in the process!

programme.desc: Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip to a surprising destination, where they learn they can make anywhere special and earn their Big Day Out badges in the process!

programme.desc: Alaska's a cool place to watch the salmon run, but Glitch opens a 'fishy taxi service' to help the salmon avoid tricky waterfalls and greedy bears. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.desc: In the heart of Asia lie vast arid lands. These deserts and dry grasslands are so hostile, they push life to the limit. Here, one of the rarest animals on earth, the Gobi Bear, searches desperately for water and bizarre looking long-eared Jerboas use their striking features to catch prey. On the arid grasslands, Pallas Cats need ingenious ways to get close to their prey, Mongolian Gazelles must battle harsh winters and human barriers, and Takhi are terrorised each night by Mongolian wolves.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Spice Trail Adventure S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Joanna Lumley's spice journey continues on the African island of Madagascar. Travelling overland on the country's notorious pot-holed roads, she discovers the secrets of the world's second most expensive spice, vanilla. From the unique way it's grown to how it's dealt on the streets. She searches for gold with a poor gold-mining community and finds out how cacao is used to make some of the world's best chocolate.

programme.desc: A high school kid embarks on a madcap adventure in Europe to find his online love.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece follows a team of scientists on an island to witness real dinosaurs in a park, only to see everything go wrong when a storm hits.

programme.title: The Terminal

programme.desc: When the undisputed "King of Late Night" announced his retirement, the stage is set to find a replacement host of the successful "The Tonight Show".

programme.desc: A film on the 2008 Wall Street financial crisis that explores the inner sanctum of the powerful group that decided the fate of the world's economy.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman Burbank is the star of his own TV show and the town he has lived in all his life is really a soundstage! Stars Jim Carrey.

programme.desc: Mason's crew is forced to pull off a dangerous heist for a powerful criminal, with the FBI chasing them and a family feud threatening their lives.

programme.title: Arcadian
programme.desc: Paul and his twin teenage sons, Thomas and Joseph, have been living a half-life - tranquility by day and torment by night.

programme.title: Judas And The Black Messiah

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 95
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 3
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 6

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
